rows.label: qev018801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Thank you for always favoring the Shining Erudition
Hall! I was waiting for you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Your daily activities have been recognized... You've
finally earned the right to become a Gold member, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0003
rows.name:
If you become a shiny Gold member, the Miranium
exchange rate will go up even more than now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0004
rows.name:
And as a special service, I'll present you with a much
bigger reward than usual![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0005
rows.name: The task is collecting Aurora Stone and Arc Sand Ore![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0006
rows.name:
How about it? Won't you challenge it?
It's not a bad story, is it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0007
rows.name:
Good! Just a little more and Mee-mee will be number
one on NLA's rich list, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'll hyper-modify the Alchemy Mechs and boost my
savings like crazy, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev018801_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask what she intends to do with
that much money.

rows.label: qev018801_JNK0020
rows.name: Support

rows.label: qev018801_SEL0021
rows.name: Cheer Mee-mee on.

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0009
rows.name:
The reason I want money... when I told other Nopon,
they laughed and said I was weird...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Let's see... If you become a Gold member, I'll tell you
everything perfectly, so do your best, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0011
rows.name:
Thank you! As long as you bring me the materials, I'll
make an amazing mech, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0012
rows.name: Once I do, please exchange lots and lots of Miranium![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0013
rows.name: Let's dash, dash down the money road hand in hand, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0014
rows.name: I'm almost going to be number one on NLA's rich list, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0015
rows.name: We need to get lots of Miranium and get money, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0016
rows.name:
Along with collecting the Aurora Stone and Arc Sand Ore,
exchange tons and tons of Miranium too, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0017
rows.name: Hey hey, did you get what I asked for, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0018
rows.name:
If you don't hurry, we won't be able to catch up to the
person who's number one on the rich list, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0019
rows.name:
Wow! With this, I can modify the Alchemy Mechs and
save even more money, can't I![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0020
rows.name:
Yup! From today, you are a Gold member! I want you
to accept this present, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hehe, Mee-mee has finally reached number two on the
rich list thanks to your cooperation, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0022
rows.name:
So much money, I'm very happy! Look, look, Mee-mee's
savings are huge, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev018801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask what on earth she uses that money for.

rows.label: qev018801_JNK0040
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev018801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask for the exact amount of her savings.

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0023
rows.name:
Huh? Use it?
If I use it, the money will decrease, won't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0024
rows.name:
Then number one in the rankings will get further away.
I save every penny, there's no way I'd use most of it, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0025
rows.name:
About 209.5 billion, maybe?
It was tough saving up this much, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0026
rows.name:
I've been scrimping every day, barely eating any meals
to save it up, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0027
rows.name: ...Eh? What is money for, you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0028
rows.name:
It's like a score that tells Mee-mee how wonderful her
Super Alchemy Mech is, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0029
rows.name:
So, I get lots of points and if my rank goes up, I'm happy,
and if I become number one, I'll be even happier, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_JNK0050
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev018801_SEL0051
rows.name:
Cannot empathize with Mee-mee's
way of thinking.

rows.label: qev018801_JNK0060
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev018801_SEL0061
rows.name: Empathize with Mee-mee's way of thinking.

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0030
rows.name: Hmmm... You say things just like a Nopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0031
rows.name:
I'm told that it's a waste to just save it when I have so
much money, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0032
rows.name:
But, but, there's nothing I want that badly... Mee-mee
will be happy just becoming number one, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0033
rows.name: You're not just a Gold member... you're truly a comrade, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018801_MSG0034
rows.name:
Alright! Let's earn like crazy together and save up aiming
for number one, mo![ST:wait ]
